full_image_description: The Mass of Saint Gregory. Spanish Painter. . Oil and gold on wood.
Virgin and Child Enthroned with Saints Catherine and Jerome. Spanish Painter. . Tempera, oil, and gold on wood.
Doña Marianna Stampa Parravicina (born 1612), Condesa di Segrate. Spanish Painter. . Oil on canvas.
Portrait of a Man. Spanish (Andalusian) Painter. . Oil on canvas.
Saint Michael the Archangel. Ignacio de Ries. 1640s. Oil on canvas.
Virgin and Child with the Pietà and Saints. Spanish (Castilian) Painter. . Tempera and gold on wood.
Head of a Man. Spanish (Castilian) Painter. . Oil on canvas.
Christ among the Doctors. Spanish (Catalan) Painter. . Tempera and gold on wood.
